obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0: \E6* Maybe this goes to the Fountain...?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_146_0: * O^1, who does audience in this place?/
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_150_0: * O^1, surely you know of me already./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_151_0: * I am love^1, and so mere symbols cannot contain me./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_152_0: * To which you seek to put a face.../%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_169_0: \Ey* You may find no more than a butterfly./%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_211_0: \E1* Though^1, sometimes I prefer the face./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_225_0: \E0* Yes^1, in this place^1, so am I known./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_226_0: \E1* Blue^1. A Flower^1, with shadow cast in the shape of Man./%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_257_0: \E1* Birthed from dark^1, baptized with name and ego./%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_267_0: \E1* And until the sun rises^1, I too shall dance my part.../%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_364_0: \EK* Aren't you supposed to be..^1. stopping us?/
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_366_0: \E1* Blu hu hu hu^1. Flowery may have directed me so./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_369_0: \E1* But in the margins of my role^1, I plead comedy^1, not tragedy./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_370_0: \E1* As Mr. Butterfly says^1, Flowers be not weapons of war./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_373_0: \E1* We are mere messengers^1. Messengers of love./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_376_0: \E1* Are you not here because of love?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_395_0: \E1* Susie^1, whose every breath holds Noelle's name./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_401_0: \E1* Ralsei^1, whose every step is followed in love./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_416_0: \El* What's the point of all this!?/%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_423_0: \E1* To help you reach your love^1. This is my dream./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_426_0: \E1* Kris^1, you and Flowery both care for your father fair./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_428_0: \E1* That means^1, I must be ally to you both./%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_434_0: \EA* Well..^1. you seem like a nice guy^1, I guess./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_436_0: \E2* You're one of the nicer flowers^1, that's for certain.../
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_441_0: \Ew* Oh^1, thank you^1, thank you^1. Mr. Butterfly is blushing./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_443_0: \E1* Now^1, I shall hold you no longer^1. Here is my blessing./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_448_0: \E1* I would like to bequeath upon you my Blue Key./
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_449_0: \E1* Past the Blue door^1, lies a way to your love.../
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_462_0: \E1* Yellow^1! Yellow^1, dear^1! Come on out now!/
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_464_0: \E1* It's time to give our guests a special reward!/%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_561_0: \E1* Yellow^1, dear^1! Our guests are waiting!!/%
obj_ch5_DWCL02_slash_Step_0_gml_596_0: \EG* We should probably make sure he doesn't.../
obj_ch5_DWCL03_slash_Step_0_gml_539_0: \E7* Hey^1, no problem^1. It's all good./
